title: Outcomes Measurement
summary: We develop and evaluate ways to measure what matters in ocular oncology: core outcome frameworks, patient-reported outcomes, referral quality, delays in care, and benchmarks for care.

title: Clinical Decision Support and AI
summary: We build and validate tools that can support earlier, more consistent clinical decisions, including AI-supported approaches to choroidal nevus assessment and follow-up.

title: Perioperative Systems
summary: We translate perioperative evidence into practical protocols for ocular oncology surgery, including enhanced recovery and prehabilitation work designed for clinical implementation.

title: Data Infrastructure
summary: We create the data linkages, registry, and QA infrastructure needed for trustworthy multi-project research and future multi-site collaboration.
